summary: Iteration 51: Superadmin Dashboard & Billing System - All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Playwright. Fixed missing plan_activated_at in /api/plan/status response.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/superadmin/overview returns total_institutions, plan_distribution, pending_billing_orders, total_programs, total_reservations, total_users
VERIFIED: GET /api/superadmin/institutions returns institution list with plan, plan_label, plan_status, programs_count, reservations_count, users_count
VERIFIED: GET /api/superadmin/institutions/{id} returns detailed view with stats, usage_metrics, billing_orders
VERIFIED: PUT /api/superadmin/institutions/{id}/plan changes plan manually with billing_note support
VERIFIED: GET /api/superadmin/billing-orders lists all orders with institution_name enrichment
VERIFIED: POST /api/superadmin/billing-orders/{id}/confirm is idempotent (returns 'Already paid' for paid orders)
VERIFIED: POST /api/superadmin/billing-orders/{id}/cancel only works for pending orders (400 for non-pending)
VERIFIED: POST /api/plan/request creates billing order + sets pending state
VERIFIED: Superadmin endpoints return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests
FIXED: GET /api/plan/status now includes plan_activated_at in response
VERIFIED: Frontend Superadmin nav item visible only for superadmin emails (demo@budezivo.cz, admin@budezivo.cz)
VERIFIED: Frontend overview cards show institutions, reservations, programs, pending orders
VERIFIED: Frontend plan distribution badges show FREE, START, PRO, PRO+ counts
VERIFIED: Frontend institution list is filterable by plan type
VERIFIED: Frontend institution detail shows stats, plan info, change plan button
VERIFIED: Frontend plan change modal has plan, status, activated_by dropdowns and billing_note textarea
VERIFIED: Frontend billing orders page shows orders with Potvrdit/Zrušit buttons for pending orders
seed_data_creation: Multiple billing orders created during testing (Start, PRO, PRO+ plans with paid/cancelled/pending statuses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Superadmin dashboard fully tested. Key findings: (1) All superadmin endpoints work correctly with proper auth guards. (2) Billing order flow: POST /api/plan/request creates order → POST /api/superadmin/billing-orders/{id}/confirm activates plan. (3) Confirm is idempotent. (4) Cancel only works for pending orders. (5) Frontend shows overview cards, plan distribution, institution list with filters, detail view with stats/usage/orders, and plan change modal. (6) FakturoidBillingProvider is a placeholder (MOCKED). (7) Fixed missing plan_activated_at in /api/plan/status.

verified_features.evidence: Returns institution list with plan, stats, activity data
Returns detailed view with stats, usage_metrics, billing_orders
Lists all orders with institution_name enrichment
Activates plan, idempotent for already paid orders
Cancels pending orders, returns 400 for non-pending
Creates billing order + sets pending state
Shows stats, plan info, change plan button

mocked_apis.FakturoidBillingProvider: create_invoice returns stub - placeholder for future implementation
